name: accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual tracking causes payment delays. We streamline invoice processing instead of manual tracking and processing of invoices.
problem_solved: Manual invoice processing leads to payment delays.
